Project.title: Project
Project.description: Folder/Campaign container for grouping generated images

id.description: Unique identifier of the project folder

name.description: The user-defined name of the project folder

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this project was created

userId.description: Firebase Auth UID of the owning user

GeneratedImage.title: GeneratedImage
GeneratedImage.description: High fidelity image generated with Vertex Imagen

url.description: Base64 string or public URL of the generated image Jpeg asset

prompt.description: Final enhanced prompt used for generation

originalPrompt.description: Original prompt typed by the user

createdAt.description: Timestamp when image was successfully compiled

projectId.description: Path reference ID to include in Project folders

userId.description: Firebase Auth UID of the owner

CustomAsset.title: CustomAsset
CustomAsset.description: Custom prompt style modifier registered by the user

/projects/{projectId}.description: Directories to group collections of assets and image generations

/images/{imageId}.description: Successfully generated imagery stored in a database index

/assets/{assetId}.description: User specific custom tokens and prompt styling assets
